description: Noon-style marketplace funnel baseline rates per 100 impressions. Used by src.simulate to generate per-stage Bernoulli draws under the control arm. Calibration target taken from the spec doc 'Project 4' section.
notes: conditional_rate = P(stage_k | stage_{k-1}) under control. absolute_per_100 is the marginal share of 100 impressions reaching that stage and is shown for sanity-check only.
treatment effect is applied at the 'completion' stage (cart-page free-shipping threshold hypothesis), conditional on having reached payment.
secondary AOV and items-per-order are sampled only for users who reach completion.
lift_modifier_pp lets a segment receive a slightly different true lift; the headline analysis uses the global lift, segmentation analysis reveals the modifier.
